summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Architecture Index & Interactive Terminal section. 13 out of 15 key features working correctly with excellent responsive design and interactive functionality. Minor issues found with AI response completeness and text formatting.

ui_bugs.issue: Tab metrics have extra whitespace (leading/trailing spaces)

integration_issues.issue: AI response incomplete - only shows SYSTEM ANALYSIS section, missing PROPOSED ARCHITECTURE and PROJECTED OUTPUT sections
CTA button 'Book Architecture Scoping Call' doesn't appear consistently after AI response

passed_tests: Section 2: 30/70 split layout renders correctly with system directory (30%) and blueprint canvas (70%)
Left Panel: All 6 case study tabs visible with correct metrics
Left Panel: Auto-cycle functionality works - switches tabs every 6 seconds
Left Panel: Progress bar animation working on active tabs
Left Panel: Manual tab clicking works and pauses auto-cycle correctly
Right Panel: Blueprint Canvas shows case study content properly
Right Panel: Tech stack badges display correctly for each case study
Right Panel: The Friction, The Architecture, The Output sections all visible
Terminal: Input field with correct placeholder 'Describe your manual bottleneck...'
Terminal: AI response generation with typing effect functional
Terminal: Reset functionality works - clears input and hides response
Mobile: Horizontal swipeable tabs working correctly
Mobile: Responsive design - desktop tabs hidden, mobile tabs visible
Mobile: Terminal functionality works on mobile devices
All interactive animations and transitions working smoothly
Proper data-testid attributes present for all key elements
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix AI response generation to include all three required sections (SYSTEM ANALYSIS, PROPOSED ARCHITECTURE, PROJECTED OUTPUT) and ensure CTA button appears consistently. Also trim whitespace from tab metric text.
